question: This line chart displays average satisfaction score (1–10) by department. Which of the following statements is most accurate?

options.A: HR has the highest satisfaction score among all departments shown.
options.B: There is a cyclical pattern that repeats every two departments along the x-axis.
options.C: The chart shows a smooth and predictable progression in satisfaction as you move from the first to the last department.
options.D: The average satisfaction across all departments is identical because the line starts and ends at similar levels.

explanation: This line chart uses a continuous line over department that are purely categorical (e.g., Finance, Operations, HR, ...). Connecting points suggests there is a meaningful smooth progression from left to right, which is conceptually incorrect — these categories have no inherent numeric order. The y‑axis values are on a 1 to 10 scale, but any comparison across categories should be made with a discrete chart such as a bar chart, not by reading trends from the connecting line.
